title: SemanticRegistry
description: Versioned, cryptographically signed store of canonical semantic anchor definitions shared across all agents in a cluster.

registry_version.description: Semver version of this registry file.

published_at.description: Unix timestamp at which this version was published.

authority_high.description: Canonical natural-language description of high-authority context.

authority_deny_below.description: Default policy threshold: DENY if authority < this value (used in conjunction with sensitivity_deny_above).

sensitivity_deny_above.description: Default policy threshold: DENY if sensitivity > this value (used in conjunction with authority_deny_below).

root_key_id.description: Identifier for the signing key used to sign Passports against this registry version.

registry_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical serialization of this registry document (excluding registry_hash). Self-referential integrity check.
